title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 28.163 - One-time increase, amounts
text:
28.163.  One-time increase, amounts. — The secretary of state may, by administrative rule, provide for a one-time increase not to exceed the amounts specified in sections 347.740, 351.127, 355.023, 356.233, 359.653, 400.9-528*, and 417.018.
(L. 1994 S.B. 635) 
*In 2017 statutory reference to 400.9-508 changed to 400.9-528 in accordance with section 3.060.  Section 400.9-508 was transferred to section 400.9-528 in 2001.
